posts.title: Honhaar Scholarship - Document Verification
posts.body: To get your documents verified, visit the Tabish Alwari Building. Get your transcripts from Registrar Office Room 12. Request them at least 2 weeks in advance.
posts.author: Ayesha Chouhadry

posts.title: CS-201 Data Structures: Best Professor?
posts.body: Dr. Omer Ajaml covers the concepts very well and shares handouts with important details. The paper checking also seems sensible.
posts.author: Maham Ashraf

posts.title: Annual Tech Fest - Registration Open!
posts.body: Register your team before May 30 at the Student Affairs Office. The event will be held in the Main Auditorium.
posts.author: Imama Masood

posts.title: CM Laptop Scheme - Portals Open?
posts.body: The portal for CM Laptop Scheme has opened. If you have 65 percent or above marks in intermediate, you can apply right now. Do not miss this golden chance.
posts.author: Bisma Ijaz

posts.title: Assignment Help: MTH-101 Calculus
posts.body: For Question 3, use integration by parts. Check the solved examples in the textbook, especially Chapter 5.
posts.author: Ali Raza

posts.title: Midterm Notes for ENG-201
posts.body: I have uploaded a PDF with summarised notes for the first 5 lectures. It covers all important topics. Message me if you need a copy.
posts.author: Sara Khalid
